introSection: Speedy Gonzales Hot Rod Racers is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. It is a Family Gravity Coaster 80STD installation from Zamperla.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Situated in the Bugs Bunny World themed area, the roller coaster opened on June 25, 2014 as part of a refresh of the area. It was built on the former location of Foghorn Leghorn's Barnyard Railway, which was removed after the 2013 season.

On December 16, 2025, it was announced that the coaster would close to make way for the opening of Looney Tunes Land, which will replace Whistlestop Park and Bugs Bunny World and will be removed. The coaster will be replaced by Bugs Bunny Play Park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has white track and black supports. Within the ride circuit are models of cacti.

fullText:
Speedy Gonzales Hot Rod Racers is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. It is a Family Gravity Coaster 80STD installation from Zamperla.

Situated in the Bugs Bunny World themed area, the roller coaster opened on June 25, 2014 as part of a refresh of the area. It was built on the former location of Foghorn Leghorn's Barnyard Railway, which was removed after the 2013 season.

On December 16, 2025, it was announced that the coaster would close to make way for the opening of Looney Tunes Land, which will replace Whistlestop Park and Bugs Bunny World and will be removed. The coaster will be replaced by Bugs Bunny Play Park.

The ride has white track and black supports. Within the ride circuit are models of cacti.
